hypothesis: Fine-tuning a state-of-the-art uMLIP pre-trained on OMat24 with a targeted set of ~500 out-of-equilibrium DFT MOF structures that sample diverse metal coordination geometries and charged states will reduce the mean absolute error of MOF bulk modulus and 300 K heat capacity predictions by at least 25% compared to the same uMLIP without this MOF-specific fine-tuning.
